project_type: Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) game with Compose Multiplatform UI
test_framework: kotlin.test with commonTest source set, no special test runner
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew desktopTest to verify all tests pass. The project does not have Docker-based builds.
setup_instructions: Project is already set up. Use ./gradlew commands directly.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Gradle build may be slow (120s+ for first run). Tests are pure unit tests in commonTest.
contribution_requirements: Branch: feat/bark-audio-system. All changes go on this branch. No PR creation needed.
key_patterns: DialogueLine(speaker, text) is a data class in ui/rpg/DialogueLine.kt. BarkEvents are enum values with registrations in BarkRegistry and BarkAudioRegistry. SliceDirector.fireBark() routes barks through the bus -> questbook -> audio player pipeline. WorldScene.onEntityInteraction is a callback set per-scene. SlicePhase enum drives the game state machine. Scripted dialogues use DialogueOverlay composable with a list of DialogueLine and currentIndex.
directory_structure: composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/ contains main sources (rpg/ for game logic, ui/rpg/ for UI). composeApp/src/commonTest/kotlin/ has tests. composeApp/src/commonMain/composeResources/files/bark/{nib,brugg,vellum}/ has WAV files.
